zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton於大約1457年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾時，他的父親Alexander Home 1st Lord Home30歲，母親Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn28歲。他於1493年3月22日之前與Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年9月9日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton于大约1457年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾时，他的父亲Alexander Home 1st Lord Home30岁，母亲Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn28岁。他于1493年3月22日之前与Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1506年9月9日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton was born about 1457, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn, was 28. He married Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston before 22 March 1493. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 September 1506, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton est né environ 1457, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston avant 22 mars 1493. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1506, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Midlothian, Écosse.

de.Lanark, South Lanarkshire, Scotland: Lanark, South Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton um 1457 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Home 1st Lord Home 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn 28. Er hat vor 22. März 1493 Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1506 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton è nato il circa 1457 nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston prima del 22 marzo 1493. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1506, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Home II Laird of Eglintonが約1457年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander Home 1st Lord Homeは30歳，母Agnes Elizabeth Hepburnは28歳であった。1493年3月22日以前にNichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年9月9日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで50歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton(이)가 대략 1457년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Home 1st Lord Home(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1493년 3월 22일 이전 Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 9월 9일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton nasceu aproximadamente 1457, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston antes 22 de março de 1493. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1506, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Midlothian, Scotland.

ro.Lanark, South Lanarkshire, Scotland: Lanark, South Lanarkshire, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Home II Laird of Eglinton родился около 1457 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Home 1st Lord Home было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Elizabeth Hepburn, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston перед 22 марта 1493 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1506 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности мидлотян, Шотландия.

Se casó con Nichola-nic-George Kerr of Samuelston antes de 22 de marzo de 1493. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1506, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Midlothian, Scotland.
